title: Proof Boundary — Security Automation Needs Guardrails
supported_claims: Security automation can accelerate both correct and incorrect actions.
Safe operating envelopes require explicit permissions, approvals, scope limits, escalation conditions, rollback, and audit evidence.
Authority should be proportionate to the consequence of the automated action.
unsupported_claims: Any product-specific capability or security claim not revalidated against current documentation.
Any universal claim that automated remediation is unsafe.
Any quantified claim about incident-response improvement or risk reduction without current evidence.
